api_token.description: Toggl Track API token, sent as HTTP Basic auth username with the literal string 'api_token' as password (Toggl's own token-auth convention). Never logged.

base_url.description: Toggl Track API base URL override for tests or proxies.

workspace_id.description: Toggl workspace id required by the 'projects', 'clients', and 'workspace_users' streams.

organization_id.description: Toggl organization id required by the 'organization_users' stream.

start_date.description: Optional start_date filter (Toggl date format) for the 'time_entries' stream.

end_date.description: Optional end_date filter (Toggl date format) for the 'time_entries' stream.
